title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: MCMINNVILLE SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1500 NE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 565-5300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 565-5300 Sunrise clinic (503) 474-3600 Main phone Sunrise clinic (541) 565-5300 Grant County Health Department (541) 575-0429 Main phone (503) 474-3600 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned aware for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MCMINNVILLE SCHOOL SBHC
